title: BuyAlaska: Give the Gift of Community & Celebrate Local Spirit this Holiday Season!
summary: As the holiday season draws near, it’s time to reflect on the true joys of the season: gathering with family, sharing joy, and thoughtfully gifting. But this year, we encourage you to make your gift-giving even more meaningful by choosing local and supporting Alaska-owned businesses. At the Alaska SBDC, we’re proud to promote the BuyAlaska Program —a powerful movement that in...
